@@ -0,0 +1,156 @@
+# Execution Report
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-177
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-25_16-15-49+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- runtime/runtime-headless/Cargo.toml — added path deps `rge-data`, `rge-scene-loader`, workspace `ron`
+- runtime/runtime-headless/src/main.rs — replaced stub with project→scene→world wiring + advance_tick + strict one-positional-arg CLI
+- runtime/runtime-headless/tests/loads_golden_simple_scene.rs — new integration test driving the compiled binary against the golden fixture
+- Cargo.lock — mechanical dependency-list update for rge-runtime-headless
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-177_TASK_2026-05-25_15-59-01+0300.md`
+
+## Pre-Execution Review Consumed
+
+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- `runtime/runtime-headless/Cargo.toml`: added three dependencies under
+  `[dependencies]` — `rge-data = { path = "../../crates/rge-data" }`,
+  `rge-scene-loader = { path = "../../crates/rge-scene-loader" }`, and
+  `ron = { workspace = true }`. Followed the existing local-crate style
+  (path dep, not promoted to `[workspace.dependencies]`) per the Planner
+  Notes. No CLI/argparse framework added.
+- `runtime/runtime-headless/src/main.rs`: replaced the placeholder stub
+  with a binary that parses argv manually (no `clap` / `structopt`),
+  enforces exactly one positional `<project-path>`, rejects multi-arg
+  invocations and any `-`-prefixed argument (covers `--help`, `-h`,
+  `--version`, any other flag shape), reads + RON-parses the project,
+  resolves `project.scenes[0]` against the project manifest's parent
+  directory, RON-parses the scene, calls
+  `rge_scene_loader::load_scene_into_world`, then calls
+  `World::advance_tick()` exactly once, then prints a single success line
+  containing the literal `entity_count=<N>` and `current_tick=<N>`
+  tokens. Errors go to stderr with non-zero exit; usage / arg-shape
+  failures use exit code 2; runtime failures use `ExitCode::FAILURE`.
+  No success evidence is printed on any error path.
+
+### Tests
+
+- `runtime/runtime-headless/tests/loads_golden_simple_scene.rs::loads_simple_scene_and_advances_one_tick`
+  — runs the compiled binary (via `env!("CARGO_BIN_EXE_rge-runtime-headless")`)
+  against `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` (resolved from
+  `env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR")` so the test is independent of the process
+  CWD), asserts success exit and that stdout contains both
+  `entity_count=2` and `current_tick=2`.
+- `…::rejects_zero_arguments` — invokes the binary with no args; asserts
+  non-zero exit and that stdout contains neither `entity_count=` nor
+  `current_tick=` (acceptance criterion: no success evidence on
+  arg-shape failure).
+- `…::rejects_extra_positional_argument` — invokes the binary with two
+  positional args; same non-success assertions.
+- `…::rejects_flag_shaped_arguments` — invokes the binary once each with
+  `--help`, `-h`, `--version`; asserts non-zero exit and no success
+  evidence for each.
+
+### Docs
+
+- None. Task packet's MUST NOT list forbids edits to scripts, workflows,
+  schemas, docs, plans, status files, and architecture doctrine files.
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+Not needed — the bullet lists above are sufficient.
+
+## Verification Results
+
+- `cargo build -p rge-runtime-headless` → exit 0 (Finished `dev` profile)
+- `cargo run -q -p rge-runtime-headless -- golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`
+  → exit 0; stdout:
+  `rge-runtime-headless: loaded project=simple-scene scene=main entity_count=2 current_tick=2`
+  (contains both required tokens `entity_count=2` and `current_tick=2`).
+- `cargo test -p rge-runtime-headless --no-fail-fast` →
+  0 unit tests + 4 integration tests, all passing
+  (`loads_simple_scene_and_advances_one_tick`,
+  `rejects_zero_arguments`,
+  `rejects_extra_positional_argument`,
+  `rejects_flag_shaped_arguments`).
+- `cargo run -q -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- all` → exit 0
+  (10 enforcement PASS + 1 supplementary PASS).
+- `.\.ai\dispatch.verify.ps1` → exit 0; VERIFY OK on all 7 steps
+  (`cargo +nightly fmt --check`, `architecture lints`,
+  `architecture-lint test suite`, `cargo deny check`,
+  `cargo test --workspace --all-targets -j 1`,
+  `cargo test --workspace --doc -j 1`,
+  `cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run`).
+  Note: an earlier run failed `cargo +nightly fmt --check` because the
+  initial main.rs had a long `eprintln!` and a separate `use std::env;`
+  / `use std::fs;`. `cargo +nightly fmt -p rge-runtime-headless` was
+  run to apply the formatter's preferred shape (merged-use + single-line
+  eprintln!), and the rerun is the exit-0 result above.
+
+## Deviations from Task Packet
+
+None — execution stayed strictly within the Task Packet scope. Only the
+`MAY edit` and `MAY add new files` sets were touched:
+- `runtime/runtime-headless/Cargo.toml`
+- `runtime/runtime-headless/src/main.rs`
+- `runtime/runtime-headless/tests/loads_golden_simple_scene.rs` (new,
+  single integration test file under the allowed `tests/` directory)
+- `Cargo.lock` (mechanical: 5-line dependency-list block for
+  `rge-runtime-headless` only)
+No forbidden path (`crates/**`, `kernel/**`, `editor/**`, other runtime
+stubs, `golden-projects/**`, workspace root members/dependencies,
+scripts, workflows, schemas, docs, status, `.gitignore`, existing
+handoff packets) was modified or created.
+
+## Open Questions for Reviewer
+
+- Acceptance criteria only require one integration test; I included
+  three additional negative-path tests (`rejects_zero_arguments`,
+  `rejects_extra_positional_argument`, `rejects_flag_shaped_arguments`)
+  in the same file because the task's Acceptance Criteria explicitly
+  call out zero-arg / multi-arg / flag-shape rejection without success
+  evidence. The MAY-add-new-files clause permits "at most one new
+  integration test file"; I read that as one file, multiple `#[test]`
+  fns allowed. Flag this if the intended reading was one `#[test]` fn
+  total.
+- The flag-rejection heuristic is purely "first character is `-`"
+  (covers `--help`, `-h`, `--version`, and any future flag shape) — no
+  allowlist of specific flag spellings. This matches the stated
+  contract ("rejects … flag-shaped invocations such as `--help`, `-h`,
+  and `--version`") and avoids implicit flag handling, but flag if a
+  narrower spelling check was intended.
+
+## Worktree State
+
+- Tracked files (modified, uncommitted):
+  - `Cargo.lock` (5-line addition: rge-runtime-headless dependency list)
+  - `runtime/runtime-headless/Cargo.toml`
+  - `runtime/runtime-headless/src/main.rs`
+- Untracked items:
+  - `runtime/runtime-headless/tests/loads_golden_simple_scene.rs` (new
+    file authored under MAY-add)
+  - `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-177_TASK_2026-05-25_15-59-01+0300.md`
+  - `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-177_TASK_2026-05-25_15-59-01+0300.meta.json`
+  - `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-177_EXEC_2026-05-25_16-15-49+0300.md` (this
+    packet)
+- Branch: `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-177`
+- Last commit: `244e57e chore(dispatch): queue runtime-headless scene loader consumer`
+
+---
+
+HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-177
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+NEXT_ROLE: REVIEWER_AI
+EXIT_CODE: 0
+
+---

@@ -0,0 +1,176 @@
+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-177
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-25_15-59-01+0300
+REVISION: 1
+RELATED_FILES:
+- runtime/runtime-headless/Cargo.toml
+- runtime/runtime-headless/src/main.rs
+- runtime/runtime-headless/tests/
+- Cargo.lock
+- crates/rge-data/src/project.rs
+- crates/rge-data/src/scene.rs
+- crates/rge-scene-loader/src/lib.rs
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project
+- golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Wire the `rge-runtime-headless` stub to the existing `rge-data` project/scene
+schemas and the `rge-scene-loader` bridge for GitHub issue #177. The binary
+must load the first scene referenced by a project manifest, advance the loaded
+world exactly one tick, and print stable stdout evidence that the tracked
+`golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` fixture loads two entities and
+reaches tick 2 after the required single tick advance.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+- `runtime/runtime-headless/Cargo.toml`
+- `runtime/runtime-headless/src/main.rs`
+- `Cargo.lock`, only for mechanical dependency-list churn caused by adding
+  dependencies to `rge-runtime-headless`
+- this dispatch's own generated `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-177_EXEC_*.md` and
+  `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-177_EXEC_*.meta.json` execution artifacts
+- this dispatch's own generated `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*` artifact, if the
+  queue runner creates one
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+- `crates/rge-scene-loader/**`
+- `crates/rge-data/**`
+- `kernel/**`
+- component crates, including `crates/components-*/**`
+- `editor/**`
+- other runtime stubs or runtime crates outside `runtime/runtime-headless/**`
+- `golden-projects/**`
+- root workspace membership or workspace dependency configuration
+- scripts, workflows, schemas, docs, plans, status files, or architecture
+  doctrine files
+- existing handoff packets, existing handoff sidecars, or existing dispatch log
+  artifacts
+- `.gitignore`
+
+### MAY add new files
+- At most one new integration test file under
+  `runtime/runtime-headless/tests/**/*.rs`
+- The containing `runtime/runtime-headless/tests/` directory, if needed for
+  that one test file
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+- Any new crate, workspace member, schema, script, workflow, doc, plan, status
+  file, golden fixture, or architecture-lint artifact
+- Any new source or test file outside `runtime/runtime-headless/tests/**/*.rs`
+- More than one runtime-headless integration test file
+
+## Deliverables
+
+- `rge-runtime-headless` accepts exactly one positional `<project-path>`
+  argument and exposes no optional flags.
+- The binary parses `<project-path>` as `rge_data::Project`, resolves the first
+  `Project.scenes` entry relative to the project manifest directory, and parses
+  that file as `rge_data::Scene`.
+- The parsed scene is loaded through `rge_scene_loader::load_scene_into_world`.
+- The resulting `World` has `World::advance_tick()` called exactly once after
+  scene load and before the success output is printed.
+- Successful stdout includes literal, testable evidence of `entity_count=2` and
+  `current_tick=2` when run against
+  `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`.
+- One integration test invokes the built binary against
+  `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`, asserts successful exit, and
+  asserts stdout contains the count and tick evidence.
+- Dependency additions in `runtime/runtime-headless/Cargo.toml` are the minimum
+  needed to parse RON project/scene data and call the scene loader. Do not add a
+  CLI framework that exposes implicit flags such as `--help` or `--version`.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- `cargo run -q -p rge-runtime-headless -- golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`
+  exits 0 and stdout contains both `entity_count=2` and `current_tick=2`.
+- `rge-runtime-headless` rejects zero arguments, more than one argument, and
+  flag-shaped invocations such as `--help`, `-h`, and `--version`; those cases
+  must not print the success count/tick evidence.
+- The runtime resolves the scene path from the manifest parent directory, not
+  from the process current directory.
+- The integration test uses the compiled `rge-runtime-headless` binary and the
+  tracked golden project fixture; it must not mutate `golden-projects/**`.
+- The implementation does not change `rge-data`, `rge-scene-loader`, ECS,
+  component, golden-project, or workspace APIs.
+
+## Constraints / Non-Goals
+
+- This dispatch is not a general runtime, renderer, server loop, cook pipeline,
+  asset loader, hierarchy propagation pass, or watch-mode implementation.
+- Do not add optional CLI flags, subcommands, environment-variable behavior, or
+  configuration discovery. The only accepted CLI shape is exactly one
+  positional `<project-path>`.
+- Do not make schema changes or extend the golden project fixture.
+- Do not add new loader capabilities or new supported component types.
+- Do not change existing tests outside the single allowed
+  `runtime/runtime-headless/tests/**/*.rs` integration test file.
+- Do not commit, push, or edit queue/task/status documentation.
+
+## Verification Gates
+
+The Executor MUST run and document the result of each of these in their
+`EXECUTION_REPORT`:
+
+- `cargo build -p rge-runtime-headless` -> expected exit 0
+- `cargo run -q -p rge-runtime-headless -- golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`
+  -> expected exit 0; stdout contains `entity_count=2` and `current_tick=2`
+- `cargo test -p rge-runtime-headless --no-fail-fast` -> expected exit 0
+- `cargo run -q -p rge-tool-architecture-lints -- all` -> expected exit 0
+- `.\.ai\dispatch.verify.ps1` -> expected exit 0
+
+## Halt Conditions
+
+The Executor MUST halt (without committing) and request fresh guidance if any
+of the following occur:
+
+- The requested behavior appears to require editing any forbidden path listed
+  above.
+- The runtime cannot load the golden simple-scene fixture through the public
+  `rge_data` and `rge_scene_loader` APIs without changing those crates.
+- A verification gate fails for a reason outside the allowed edit set, or fixing
+  the failure would require modifying a forbidden file.
+- Cargo dependency resolution requires changing workspace membership or root
+  workspace dependency configuration instead of only
+  `runtime/runtime-headless/Cargo.toml` and mechanical `Cargo.lock` churn.
+- The executor cannot preserve the exact one-positional-argument CLI contract
+  without introducing optional flags.
+
+## Planner Notes
+
+Relevant existing APIs are already present: `rge_data::{Project, Scene}` parse
+from RON via Serde, `Project.scenes` stores project-root-relative scene paths,
+and `rge_scene_loader::load_scene_into_world(&Scene)` returns a populated
+`rge_kernel_ecs::World` with `entity_count`, `current_tick`, and
+`advance_tick` behavior. Keep this dispatch as a thin binary wiring task and
+let the existing loader tests continue to own detailed component assertions.
+
+`World::new()` starts at `current_tick() == 1`; the required single
+`World::advance_tick()` after loading therefore makes the success output's
+kernel tick value `current_tick=2`. Do not print a separate ad-hoc tick counter
+that is decoupled from `World::current_tick()`.
+
+`rge-data` and `rge-scene-loader` are not workspace dependencies today. Add
+direct path dependencies in `runtime/runtime-headless/Cargo.toml` only, using
+the same local-crate style already used elsewhere in the workspace; do not
+promote either crate to `[workspace.dependencies]`.
+
+For the integration test, prefer `std::process::Command::new(env!(
+"CARGO_BIN_EXE_rge-runtime-headless"))` so no CLI test helper dependency is
+needed. Build the fixture path from `env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR")` joined with
+`../../golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` so the test is independent of
+the process current directory.
+
